name: hk_1_1
requirements: As part of your analysis, over 2025-01-28 to 2025-02-02 compute and store the network-wide (all stations) values: net_mean_pm25, net_max_pm25, net_mean_aqhi, net_max_aqhi (float).

turns.query: How does Hong Kong's air quality typically change during Chinese New Year (2025-01-28 to 2025-02-02) ? Is there improvement compared to normal times?
